cases.note: Enable=false → /loyalty-catalog redirected to /404; no product grid; no JS errors. Cleanup: restored Enable=true.
Currency empty (Enable=true, Mode=Mixed Cart) → /404; no grid. Cleanup: restored Currency=PTS.
Mode empty → /404; no grid. Cleanup: restored Mode=Mixed Cart.
Coupon Redemption mode → /404; does not open catalog. Cleanup: restored Mode=Mixed Cart.
Payment Method mode → /404; does not open catalog. Cleanup: restored Mode=Mixed Cart.
Mixed Cart → URL stays /loyalty-catalog; 50-result grid + breadcrumb 'Loyalty catalog'; SearchProducts currencyCode=PTS; no JS errors.
Loyalty Store mode → /loyalty-catalog opens, grid renders, SearchProducts currencyCode=PTS. Cleanup: restored Mode=Mixed Cart.
Breadcrumb 'Loyalty catalog' (resolved i18n, not raw key); h1 'Loyalty catalog'; <title> 'QA & Loyalty catalog'; no i18n missing-key warnings; no JS errors.
50 products, each card shows a price; category root view; SearchProducts 200 currencyCode=PTS; no 4xx/5xx on products query.
Card prices in loyalty currency (PTS150.00, PTS40.00, PTS80.00, PTS200.00) — NOT USD; SearchProducts currencyCode=PTS not USD.
First card href namespaced /loyalty-catalog/product/d8ebf158-...; PDP renders name + PTS150.00 price; no 4xx/5xx.
PDP price PTS150.00 (loyalty currency, not USD); name non-empty; GetProduct currencyCode=PTS; errors[] absent.
Standard /catalog shows USD prices ($493.00, $10.00, etc.); product links not namespaced under /loyalty-catalog/ (use generic /product/{id}); SearchProducts currencyCode=USD.
In-stock badges with quantities visible on cards; GetProduct availabilityData.isAvailable=true, isInStock=true, availableQuantity=119.
Direct address-bar nav to /loyalty-catalog/product/d8ebf158-... resolved to PDP (no 404, no redirect loop); name + PTS150.00 price; no 5xx.
Authenticated B2B user with Enable=false → /loyalty-catalog redirected to /404; no grid; no JS errors. Guard not bypassable by auth. Cleanup: restored Enable=true (still signed in).
After loyalty-catalog visit, /catalog shows USD prices and non-namespaced links; second SearchProducts carries currencyCode=USD — no loyalty currency state leakage.

Loyalty-scoped GetCategory childCategories carries currencyCode=PTS + productFilter 'category.subtree:fc596540... price.PTS:(0 TO) inStock_variations:true'; category sidebar renders (Accessories 45, Loyalty products 1); errors[] absent; no 4xx/5xx.

API contract (primary): both models (related-products, bought-together) carry currencyCode=PTS, errors[] empty. DOM portion N/A: both responses products:[] → no recommendations widget. No JS errors.
Clicked main-nav 'Loyalty' menuitem (sibling of 'All brands') from home → URL /loyalty-catalog; grid + 'Loyalty catalog' breadcrumb render; SearchProducts currencyCode=PTS.

Sidebar links namespaced /loyalty-catalog/accessories & /loyalty-catalog/loyalty-products; navigating to /loyalty-catalog/accessories stays under /loyalty-catalog/ prefix; sub-category SearchProducts currencyCode=PTS with subtree filter; grid renders; no 4xx/5xx.

Asserted 'Loyalty catalog' root crumb href = /loyalty-catalog (NOT /catalog). Category-level crumbs (Catalog→/catalog, Accessories→/accessories) render un-namespaced — explicitly noted by the test as known current behavior, not asserted. No JS errors.

console_summary: No JS errors/exceptions on any loyalty page. Benign noise only: external product-image 404s (md.all.biz ERR_BLOCKED_BY_ORB; vcst-qa cms-content/.../*.jpg 404) on /catalog and sub-category pages — env data, not loyalty defects. No i18n missing-key warnings.
network_summary: All loyalty GraphQL ops returned 200, no errors[]. ERR_ABORTED GraphQL entries are superseded duplicate/cancelled prefetches (the live ops returned 200). No checkout/loyalty-API 4xx/5xx. Slow op: GetShortCart ~5.4s on first cold load (cart context, not loyalty grid — informational).
